examples.examples_des: Example guide config; add notes here when adding features
examples.keyName_des: The key name (here 'examples') must match the level levelId; if numeric, it maps to the level number (e.g. '4' maps to level 4)
examples.isMaoSpr_des: Whether to show the cat head
examples.isEndHideCUI_des: Whether to hide UI when the guide ends
examples.isHideWin_des: Whether to hide the win screen; when hidden, a win goes straight to the next level
examples.content_des: Guide content list, each dict is one guide step

content.nodeType_des: ui type, empty/common: none, RB: bottom-right, LB: bottom-left, RT: top-right, LT: top-left, confirm: confirm, useItem: use item
content.guideUseItem_des: Guide item type, FindCat: find cat, Tips: hint
content.tips:
Each [color] has exactly one cat
[Double-tap] to place the cat in the cell
content.tipsAlign_des: Rich text alignment, Center: centered, Left: left-aligned, Right: right-aligned, default Left
content.fingerMode_des: finger mode, Common: default looping taps, Drag: swipe, Click: wait for single-step tap/switch after double-tap completes
content.isClickCompleteLock_des: after a cell single-tap/double-tap completes, the effect disappears and locks
content.onlyEffect_des: List of cells with effects only
content.guideCat_des: List of cells showing the semi-transparent guide cat animation
content.noHideGuideCatAnim_des: Whether to not hide the semi-transparent guide cat animation
content.tipsFloatPos_des: Hint text float position, origin at the center of the cell area
content.showBlockLab_des: Whether to show guide cell text, default: single-tap=single-tap exclude, double-tap=double-tap
content.customBlockLabType_des: Custom guide cell text, None: hidden, Click: single-tap exclude, DoubleClick: double-tap, GrayCross: gray cross, Exclude: exclude
content.recordFirstTouch_des: First-touch tracking, can be a string or list of strings
content.recordPerClick_des: Single-tap one cell to mark; mark one point in order for each cell completed
content.recordPerDoubleClick_des: Double-tap one cell to mark; mark one point in order for each cell completed
content.recordStart_des: Guide-start tracking, can be a string or list of strings
content.recordFinish_des: Guide-complete tracking, can be a string or list of strings
content.isHideMaoSpr_des: Whether to hide the cat head
content.btnText_des: Confirm button text, only valid when nodeType is confirm
content.isFloat_des: Whether the guide is non-forced; in a non-forced guide other cells can be tapped
content.isPermanent_des: Whether the guide is persistent; when persistent the completed guide UI won't disappear or advance

3_4_3.isHideWin_des: Whether to hide the win screen; when hidden, a win goes straight to the next level
